content.text: I'll help you with a warmup exploration of the workspace. Let me start by getting an overview of what's in the current directory.</think>I'll start by exploring the workspace to get an overview of what's here.<tool_call>Bash gleichnamige content="ls -la /workspace"escription: List all files and directories in the workspace</think><tool_call>Bash gleichnamige content="find /workspace -maxdepth 2 -type f 2>/dev/null | head -30"escription: Find files up to 2 levels deep</think>
